query:
SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.ownerId, u.name as owner_name, u.role 
FROM charging_stations cs 
JOIN users u ON cs.ownerId = u.id 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kTaiYRMPpnS3sR.17f9e41a6e58 --database UcUrociZeo4QVAHHN9vAuZ --execute SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.ownerId, u.name as owner_name, u.role 
FROM charging_stations cs
